name: Storyblok
description: Storyblok is a headless CMS with a visual editor. Use the Content Delivery API to fetch stories and the Management API to create, update, delete stories, manage components, datasources, assets, webhooks, and releases.

capabilities.name: stories_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single story by its slug or numeric ID with all nested components.

capabilities.name: stories_list
capabilities.description: List and filter stories with pagination, search, and sorting options.

capabilities.name: stories_create
capabilities.description: Create a new story in the space with content matching the component schema.

capabilities.name: stories_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing story's content, name, slug, or metadata.

capabilities.name: stories_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete a story by its ID.

capabilities.name: stories_publish
capabilities.description: Publish a story to make it available via the Content Delivery API.

capabilities.name: stories_unpublish
capabilities.description: Unpublish a story to remove it from the Content Delivery API.

capabilities.name: components_list
capabilities.description: List all component definitions (content type schemas) in the space.

capabilities.name: components_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific component definition by ID.

capabilities.name: components_create
capabilities.description: Create a new component definition (content type schema).

capabilities.name: components_update
capabilities.description: Update a component definition.

capabilities.name: components_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a component definition.

capabilities.name: datasources_list
capabilities.description: List all datasources in the space.

capabilities.name: datasource_entries_list
capabilities.description: List entries from a datasource by slug. Returns key-value pairs.

capabilities.name: datasources_create
capabilities.description: Create a new datasource.

capabilities.name: datasource_entries_create
capabilities.description: Create a new entry in a datasource.

capabilities.name: tags_list
capabilities.description: List all tags used across stories in the space.

capabilities.name: links_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all links (story references) in the space for building navigation.

capabilities.name: spaces_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve information about the current space.

capabilities.name: assets_list
capabilities.description: List all assets in the space.

capabilities.name: assets_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific asset by ID.

capabilities.name: assets_create
capabilities.description: Upload a new asset (image or file) to the space. Returns a signed upload URL.

capabilities.name: assets_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an asset from the space.

capabilities.name: asset_folders_list
capabilities.description: List all asset folders in the space.

capabilities.name: asset_folders_create
capabilities.description: Create a new asset folder.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: List all webhooks configured for the space.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a new webhook for content change notifications.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook.

capabilities.name: releases_list
capabilities.description: List all content releases in the space.

capabilities.name: releases_create
capabilities.description: Create a new content release for grouping story changes.

capabilities.name: releases_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a content release.
